purpose: Reusable repository that stores only test steps and expected results.

step_result_pairs.expected_result: A list of parts related to the previously selected machine is displayed.
The user can see the SIS2 application running correctly in the development environment.

step_result_pairs.step: Enter the machine serial number or its prefix.
step_result_pairs.expected_result: A list of machines or parts is displayed so the user can select one.
A menu with options related to the prefix or serial number is displayed.
All service information related to the selected product and its organization is displayed.
All repair information related to the selected product and its organization is displayed.
A pane populated with elements related to parts is visible for the user to select.
A pane populated with elements related to repair is visible for the user to select.
